cost_analysis.note: Backtest plays each suggestion against every historical draw.

prev_suggestions_performance.note: No draws occurred after suggestions were generated.

analysis.llm_summary: Selected top candidates prioritize digits frequent in each position based on historical data, especially digits 4,3,7 in position 1; 6,5,3 in position 2; 9,3,6 in position 3; 4,1,5 in position 4; 9,2,0 in position 5; 1,0,7 in position 6; and 9,3,0 in position 7. The top5 are the highest scoring candidates from the shortlist, ensuring strong alignment with these positional frequencies.
